/** * @license React * react-dom-test-utils.production.js * * Copyright (c) Meta Platforms, Inc. and affiliates. * * This source code is licensed under the MIT license found in the * LICENSE file in the root directory of this source tree. */ "use strict"; var React = require("react"), didWarnAboutUsingAct = !1; exports.act = function (callback) { !1 === didWarnAboutUsingAct && ((didWarnAboutUsingAct = !0), console.error( "`ReactDOMTestUtils.act` is deprecated in favor of `React.act`. Import `act` from `react` instead of `react-dom/test-utils`. See https://react.dev/warnings/react-dom-test-utils for more info." )); return React.act(callback); };
